name: Daily Notes
author: Notesaner
description: Auto-create and navigate date-based notes. Supports daily, weekly, and monthly periodic notes with configurable filename formats, templates, and a mini calendar sidebar panel. Hotkey: Cmd+Shift+D (open today's note).

autoCreate.description: Automatically open or create today's daily note on workspace startup.

nameFormat.description: Filename format for daily notes. Tokens: YYYY, YY, MM, DD, ddd, dddd.

folder.description: Folder for daily notes (relative to workspace root). Empty = root.

templateId.description: Path to a template note used when creating new daily notes.

weeklyFormat.description: Filename format for weekly notes. Default produces 2026-W12.

weeklyFolder.description: Folder for weekly notes. Falls back to the daily notes folder.

monthlyFormat.description: Filename format for monthly notes. Default produces 2026-03.

monthlyFolder.description: Folder for monthly notes. Falls back to the daily notes folder.
